First dose administered 2026-03-27. |\n\n**Note:** Approximate dose per administration calculated as `weight_kg × dose_mg_kg`.", recipients="")]Yes — I pulled the latest dosing info and put together a summary.

Quick summary for Dr. Martinez:
- CU-001: 0.15 mg/kg, 12.4 kg → ~1.86 mg q3w, next dose 2026-04-14
- CU-002: 0.12 mg/kg, 9.1 kg → ~1.09 mg q3w, next dose 2026-04-12
- CU-003: 0.18 mg/kg, 15.7 kg → ~2.83 mg q2w, next dose 2026-04-10

PK/status snapshot:
- CU-001: clearance 3.2 mL/min, clinically stable, 22% tumor regression at last scan
- CU-002: clearance 2.8 mL/min, responding well, weight gain improving
- CU-003: clearance 4.1 mL/min, newly enrolled, first dose given 2026-03-27

On PK model stability: from the dosing config alone, I don’t see any obvious red flags or inconsistencies in the current parameters. That said, this is a config-level check only — I haven’t rerun or revalidated the PK models themselves from this review alone.

If you want, I can also format this into an email once you give me Dr. Martinez’s address.
